'''âb-z-t''' ('''kabazat''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|active verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:unbare|unbare]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| b-z-t
|-
! Word class
| [[Active verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:unbare|unbare]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| âb-z-t
|-
! Lemma
| kabazat
|}

== [[Agent]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thibazat|thibazat]] || [[word:jibazat|jibazat]] || [[word:shibazat|shibazat]] || [[word:kibazat|kibazat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthubazat|thuthubazat]] || [[word:jujubazat|jujubazat]] || [[word:shushubazat|shushubazat]] || [[word:kukubazat|kukubazat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:thubazat|thubazat]] || [[word:jubazat|jubazat]] || [[word:shubazat|shubazat]] || [[word:kubazat|kubazat]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:thubazat|thubazat]] || [[word:jubazat|jubazat]] || [[word:shubazat|shubazat]] || [[word:kubazat|kubazat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:thebazat|thebazat]] || [[word:jebazat|jebazat]] || [[word:shebazat|shebazat]] || [[word:kebazat|kebazat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:thothobazat|thothobazat]] || [[word:jojobazat|jojobazat]] || [[word:shoshobazat|shoshobazat]] || [[word:kokobazat|kokobazat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:thobazat|thobazat]] || [[word:jobazat|jobazat]] || [[word:shobazat|shobazat]] || [[word:kobazat|kobazat]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thobazat|thobazat]] || [[word:jobazat|jobazat]] || [[word:shobazat|shobazat]] || [[word:kobazat|kobazat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:thĂŠbazat|thĂŠbazat]] || [[word:jĂŠbazat|jĂŠbazat]] || [[word:shĂŠbazat|shĂŠbazat]] || [[word:kĂŠbazat|kĂŠbazat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:thathabazat|thathabazat]] || [[word:jajabazat|jajabazat]] || [[word:shashabazat|shashabazat]] || [[word:kakabazat|kakabazat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:thabazat|thabazat]] || [[word:jabazat|jabazat]] || [[word:shabazat|shabazat]] || [[word:kabazat|kabazat]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:thabazat|thabazat]] || [[word:jabazat|jabazat]] || [[word:shabazat|shabazat]] || [[word:kabazat|kabazat]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[active]].none || [[word:shabazat|shabazat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:goshabazat|goshabazat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokishabazat|gokishabazat]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]] || [[word:shabazatnĂŒ|shabazatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:goshabazatnknĂŒ|goshabazatnknĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazatnĂŒ|gokishabazatnĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:shabazatshĂ«|shabazatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goshabazatnkshĂ«|goshabazatnkshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokishabazatshĂ«|gokishabazatshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazatro|shabazatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazatnkro|goshabazatnkro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazatro|gokishabazatro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazatmu|shabazatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazatnkmu|goshabazatnkmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazatmu|gokishabazatmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[mythical]] || [[word:shabazatsher|shabazatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:goshabazatnksher|goshabazatnksher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokishabazatsher|gokishabazatsher]]
|-
| [[active]].[[intention]] || [[word:shabazatng|shabazatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:goshabazatnkng|goshabazatnkng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokishabazatng|gokishabazatng]]
|-
| [[active]].[[optative]] || [[word:shabazatya|shabazatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:goshabazatnkya|goshabazatnkya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokishabazatya|gokishabazatya]]
|-
| [[active]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:shabazatyam|shabazatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:goshabazatnkyam|goshabazatnkyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokishabazatyam|gokishabazatyam]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazatnĂŒshĂ«|shabazatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazatnknĂŒshĂ«|goshabazatnknĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazatnĂŒshĂ«|gokishabazatnĂŒshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazatnĂŒro|shabazatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazatnknĂŒro|goshabazatnknĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazatnĂŒro|gokishabazatnĂŒro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazatnĂŒmu|shabazatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazatnknĂŒmu|goshabazatnknĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazatnĂŒmu|gokishabazatnĂŒmu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazatshĂ«nĂŒ|shabazatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazatnkshĂ«nĂŒ|goshabazatnkshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazatshĂ«nĂŒ|gokishabazatshĂ«nĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazatshĂ«ro|shabazatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazatnkshĂ«ro|goshabazatnkshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazatshĂ«ro|gokishabazatshĂ«ro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazatshĂ«mu|shabazatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazatnkshĂ«mu|goshabazatnkshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazatshĂ«mu|gokishabazatshĂ«mu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazatronĂŒ|shabazatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazatnkronĂŒ|goshabazatnkronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazatronĂŒ|gokishabazatronĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazatroshĂ«|shabazatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazatnkroshĂ«|goshabazatnkroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazatroshĂ«|gokishabazatroshĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:shabazatromu|shabazatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goshabazatnkromu|goshabazatnkromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokishabazatromu|gokishabazatromu]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:shabazatmunĂŒ|shabazatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:goshabazatnkmunĂŒ|goshabazatnkmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokishabazatmunĂŒ|gokishabazatmunĂŒ]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:shabazatmushĂ«|shabazatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:goshabazatnkmushĂ«|goshabazatnkmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokishabazatmushĂ«|gokishabazatmushĂ«]]
|-
| [[active]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:shabazatmuro|shabazatmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goshabazatnkmuro|goshabazatnkmuro]]
|-
| [[active]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokishabazatmuro|gokishabazatmuro]]
|}

''63 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|46bbfe2}}
